summary_raw: AMD reports Q1 2026 earnings on May 5 (after close). Consensus: EPS $1.29 (+34.4% YoY), revenue $9.89B (+33.0% YoY). Stock rallied ~88% since early March to ~$314 before slight pullback. DA Davidson upgraded to Buy, PT $375. AMD signed 6GW deal with OpenAI (first 1GW MI450 GPUs in H2 2026) and similar 6GW deal with Meta (custom MI450 + 6th-gen EPYC Venice CPUs). AMD also supplying 50,000 MI450 GPUs to Oracle by Q3 2026.
